utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2) travel_dates: Provided (September 15–19, 2024) — fully specified.
3) transportation: Detailed with type and cost — fully specified.
4) accommodation: Includes name, details, and cost — fully specified.
5) activities: Lists multiple activities with individual and total costs — fully specified.
6) additional_services: Provided with discount info and cost impact — fully specified.
7) total_budget: Provided with total and per traveler breakdown — fully specified.
All items are present and contain all required details.
